email.invitation.subject: You've been invited to join a group on Strido
email.invitation.preheader: {{.InviterName}} invited you to join a group on Strido.
email.invitation.title: You have been invited to join a group
email.invitation.intro: {{.InviterName}} invited you to join a group on Strido.
email.invitation.footer: This invitation was sent from Strido because someone entered this email address while sharing a group.
email.invitation_accepted.subject: Your invitation was accepted
email.invitation_accepted.title: Your invitation was accepted
email.member_removed.subject: You have been removed from group '{{.GroupName}}'
email.member_removed.title: Group membership updated
email.member_removed.intro: You have been removed from the **“{{.GroupName}}”** group.
email.video_uploaded.subject: New Video Uploaded
email.video_uploaded.title: New video uploaded
email.video_reviewed.subject: Your video has been reviewed
email.video_reviewed.title: Your video has been reviewed
email.video_reviewed.intro: Your video **“{{.VideoName}}”** has been reviewed and the feedback is ready.
email.booking_confirmed.subject: Live Coaching Session Confirmed
email.booking_confirmed.preheader: Your live coaching session has been confirmed.
email.booking_confirmed.title: Live coaching session confirmed
email.booking_confirmed.intro: Your **“{{.SessionName}}”** session with **{{.PartnerName}}** for **“{{.GroupName}}”** is booked for **{{.ScheduledAt}}** and lasts {{.Duration}}.
email.booking_cancelled.subject: Live Coaching Session Cancelled
email.booking_cancelled.preheader: A coaching session has been cancelled.
email.booking_cancelled.title: Live coaching session cancelled
email.booking_cancelled.intro: The **“{{.SessionName}}”** session for **“{{.GroupName}}”**, scheduled for **{{.ScheduledAt}}**, was cancelled by **{{.CancellerName}}**.
email.reminder.subject: Coaching Session Reminder
email.reminder.preheader: You have an upcoming coaching session.
email.reminder.title: Coaching session reminder
email.reminder.intro: Your coaching session starts at **{{.ScheduledAt}}** and lasts {{.Duration}}.
email.reminder.intro_imminent: Your coaching session starts shortly at **{{.ScheduledAt}}** and lasts {{.Duration}}.
